---
pagetitle: "News | ECLIPSE Lab"
toc: false
listing:
  contents: "posts/**/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  max-items: 12
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">News</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

## News & Highlights

This page collects recent lab highlights across talks, awards, positions, people, and project milestones.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
### Featured highlight
**Join the ECLIPSE Lab.** We are actively building the group across computational imaging, inverse problems, and AI-enabled materials characterization.

- Explore [open opportunities](opportunities.qmd)
- Learn more about our [research directions](research.qmd)
- Get in touch via the [contact page](contact.qmd)
:::

## Highlights by topic

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}
### Talks & conferences
- [EMC 2024 conference](posts/emc2024/index.qmd)
- [International Microscopy Congress 2023](posts/imc20/index.qmd)
- [MRS Fall 2023 conference](posts/mrs2023/index.qmd)
- [CRC 1411 Symposium](posts/crc1411/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
### People & positions
- [Shengbo You joins the team](posts/shengbo_joins/index.qmd)
- [Radin Rahimi joins the team](posts/radin_joins/index.qmd)
- [Open position announcement](posts/24-04-position/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.column width="34%"}
### Grants, projects & lab momentum
- [Study commission update](posts/24-07_study_commission/index.qmd)
- [CRC 1411 Symposium](posts/crc1411/index.qmd)
- [More research stories and updates](research.qmd)
:::

::::

## Recent updates

Below is the reverse-chronological archive of recent news items.
